nasb.text: then I will act with wrathful hostility against you, and I, even I, will punish you seven times for your sins.

esv.text: then I will walk contrary to you in fury, and I myself will discipline you sevenfold for your sins.

cnv.text: 我就必發烈怒，與你們作對；我要按著你們的罪，再加重七倍管教你們。

ccb.text: 我也要与你们作对，向你们发烈怒，把比先前严厉七倍的惩罚加在你们身上。
